name: lunchdinner-automation
description: Playwright + Cucumber automation framework for lunchdinner.co.nz

scripts.test: npx tsx node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js --config cucumber.cjs && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:headed: cross-env HEADED=true npx tsx node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js --config cucumber.cjs && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:smoke: npx tsx node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js --config cucumber.cjs --tags @smoke && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:auth: npx tsx node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js --config cucumber.cjs --tags @auth && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:menu: npx tsx node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js --config cucumber.cjs --tags @menu && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:cart: npx tsx node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js --config cucumber.cjs --tags @cart && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:nav: npx tsx node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js --config cucumber.cjs --tags @navigation && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:order-flow: npx tsx node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js --config cucumber.cjs --tags @complete-order-flow && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:order-flow:headed: cross-env HEADED=true npx tsx node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber.js --config cucumber.cjs --tags @complete-order-flow && npm run allure:generate
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
